title: arnica mollis var. scaberrima
intro: Arnica mollis var. scaberrima, also known as rough-leaved arnica, is a variety of the arnica plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce pain and swelling, promote healing, and prevent infection. The health benefits of using Arnica mollis var. scaberrima include reducing bruising and swelling, alleviating pain, and improving wound healing, making it a popular remedy for minor injuries and sports-related trauma. Herbal preparations of Arnica mollis var. scaberrima include topical creams, ointments, and salves that can be applied directly to the affected area, as well as oral supplements and teas that can be taken to promote overall health and well-being.
